mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order p INNER JOIN t_prepay_order pr ON pr.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id WHERE p.status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') AND pr.expires_at < NOW() ), 0) AS expiredPaymentCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order WHERE status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK' ), 0) AS pendingCallbackCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_event WHERE publish_status = 'FAILED' ), 0) AS failedEventCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_refund_order WHERE status = 'FAIL' ), 0) AS failedRefundCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_day_end_batch WHERE batch_status = 'WARNING' ), 0) AS warningDayEndBatchCount

SELECT task_log_no AS taskLogNo, task_code AS taskCode, task_name AS taskName, run_mode AS runMode, task_status AS taskStatus, task_status_type AS taskStatusType, processed_count AS processedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, summary_comment AS summaryComment, triggered_by AS triggeredBy, DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startedAt, DATE_FORMAT(completed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS completedAt FROM t_payment_task_run_log ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_task_run_log ( task_log_no, task_code, task_name, run_mode, task_status, task_status_type, severity_level, severity_level_type, escalation_status, escalation_status_type, processed_count, success_count, fail_count, summary_comment, suggested_action, recommended_route, triggered_by, started_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{taskLogNo}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{runMode}, #{taskStatus}, #{taskStatusType}, #{severityLevel}, #{severityLevelType}, #{escalationStatus}, #{escalationStatusType}, #{processedCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{summaryComment}, #{suggestedAction}, #{recommendedRoute}, #{triggeredBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
